+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-14303-cannot-start-machine-with-podman-version-4-1-0-in-m",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac",
+    "description": "Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac. This issue affects 18+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for error: `0 (30 days)`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Description**\n\nIn a M1 Mac, Downloaded the VM via `podman machine init` and then when trying to start it via `podman machine start` I get thew following error: \n```\nStarting machine \"podman-machine-default\"\nWaiting for VM ..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac",
+        "description": "In case it's of any use, I'm finding that the max memory I'm able to set on a machine is `3072`, otherwise I see the `connection refused` error.\n\n✔️ The following works:\n```\npodman machine init # default memory is 2048\npodman machine start\n```\n\n```\npodman machine init -m 3072\npodman machine\n```yaml\nStarting machine \"podman-machine-default\"\nWaiting for VM ...\nError: dial unix /var/folders/kk/vvrx0k6x2b54wnnhc0zt6rv00000gr/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock: connect: connection refused\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `0 (30 days)` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "In case it's of any use, I'm finding that the max memory I'm able to set on a machine is `3072`, otherwise I see the `connection refused` error.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Starting machine \"podman-machine-default\"\nWaiting for VM ...\nError: dial unix /var/folders/kk/vvrx0k6x2b54wnnhc0zt6rv00000gr/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock: connect: connection refused",
+        "Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM\nError: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:56180/run/user/504/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp [::1]:56180: connect: connection refused",
+        "Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM\nError: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:56180/run/user/504/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp [::1]:56180: connect: connection refused"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
